content: Looking for fresh RDP access to healthcare companies in EU. Willing to pay 50k for full admin.
New LockBit variant is ready. Encrypts 2x faster. Contact me via Jabber: king@exploit.im. Anyone targeting example-corp.com?
Selling combo lists. 10M records. Validated against major banking sites. PM for details. Also selling zero-day for CVE-2026-0001.
Can anyone help with bypassing Cloudflare on contoso.com? We have the phishing page ready.
